## 🔍 Initial Reconnaissance

```bash
# File type check
file attachment

# Strings search
strings attachment | grep -i "flag\|ctf\|password\|key"

# Hex dump
xxd attachment | head -30

# Check metadata
exiftool attachment.jpg
```
